command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import subprocess, time
cmd = ['bun','test','./src/lib/review-utils.test.ts','./src/lib/partial-review-formatter.test.ts']
start = time.time()
proc = subprocess.run(cmd, text=True, capture_output=True)
end = time.time()
print(proc.stdout, end='')
if proc.stderr:
    print(proc.stderr, end='')
print(f'__EXIT_CODE__={proc.returncode}')
print(f'__DURATION_MS__={int((end-start)*1000)}')
PY

command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import subprocess, time
cmd = "rg -n \"Retry state: .*|Bounded first-pass: timeout via checkpoint evidence|Continuation state: follow-up review pending for remaining scope\" src/lib/review-utils.test.ts src/lib/partial-review-formatter.test.ts"
start = time.time()
proc = subprocess.run(cmd, shell=True, text=True, capture_output=True)
end = time.time()
print(proc.stdout, end='')
if proc.stderr:
    print(proc.stderr, end='')
print(f'__EXIT_CODE__={proc.returncode}')
print(f'__DURATION_MS__={int((end-start)*1000)}')
PY
